name: TV Channels Network Inc.
business: TV Channels Network Inc. is a Nevada-based music and entertainment technology company whose primary business is the providing of streaming entertainment content, including over 300 national live channels, 100 live video concert channels, and pay-per-view events, targeting consumers who subscribe to its streaming service.

exposures.sentence: TV Channels Network Inc. is a Nevada-based music and entertainment technology company whose primary business is the providing of streaming entertainment content.

catalysts.sentence: We expect to go live with over 300 channels soon after of the close of this offering.
We expect to be generating positive revenues within 45 to 60 days after going live with our premium channels subscription packages.
Further, the Company will produce with Mr. Bostic all future World Class Wrestling events, with the first events to take place in 2026.

catalysts.event: Start national TV advertising and social media campaigns
catalysts.sentence: Upon the closing of this offering, we will start our national TV advertising and social media campaigns in order to secure monthly subscribers to our streaming service.
